---
title: Getting started with PyTorch
aliases:
  - top_intro.html
description: An introductory course to deep learning with &nbsp;[![](pt/img/logo_pytorch.svg){width="1.1em"}](https://pytorch.org/)
title-block-banner: true
---

:::{.topdef}

This introductory course to deep learning and neural networks offers a high-level explanation of concepts before diving into simple applications using the [PyTorch](https://pytorch.org/) framework. It does not assume any prior knowledge in machine learning. Some basic [Python](https://www.python.org/) is useful, but not strictly necessary.

:::

<br>
[[Start course ➤](pt/pt_intro.qmd)]{.topinline}

<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "LearningResource",
  "name": "Getting started with PyTorch",
  "description": "This introductory course to deep learning and neural networks offers a high-level explanation of concepts before diving into simple applications using the PyTorch framework. It does not assume any prior knowledge in machine learning. Some basic Python is useful, but not strictly necessary.",
  "url": "https://mint.westdri.ca/ai/top_pt",
  "learningResourceType": "course",
  "inLanguage": "en",
  "license": "https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/",
  "provider": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "SFU Research Computing Group",
  },
  "keywords": "AI, deep learning, PyTorch, Python",
  "author": {
    "@type": "Person",
    "name": "Marie-Hélène Burle"
  }
}
</script>
